heading: About
intro: I am a Computer Science student with a strong interest in machine learning, distributed systems, and software engineering. My experience spans research, production engineering, and technical fellowship programs, where I have worked on applying machine learning to real-world scientific problems while strengthening my software development and systems skills.
paragraphs: I am a Computer Science student with a strong interest in machine learning, distributed systems, and software engineering. I am from Zimbabwe.

My experience spans research, production engineering, and technical fellowship programs. At Fermilab I applied state-of-the-art generative machine learning to high-energy physics problems within the CMS experiment at CERN, and through the Meta Production Engineering Fellowship I learned how large-scale production systems are designed, deployed, monitored, and maintained.
I care about software that is precise, reliable, and fast — whether that is a model calibrating collision data from the Large Hadron Collider or infrastructure automation that keeps systems running.
highlights: Applied generative machine learning to CMS experiment calibrations at Fermilab
Trained in large-scale production engineering with Meta engineers through MLH
Selected for the Google Basta and Uber Career Prep fellowships
Hands-on with PyTorch, Linux, containers, and infrastructure automation

facts.label: Focus
facts.value: Machine learning, distributed systems, software engineering

facts.label: Recent
facts.value: Generative ML research at Fermilab (CMS experiment, CERN)

interests_intro: Away from the keyboard, I follow anything measured in lap times, miles, and match minutes.

interests.name: Formula 1
interests.description: Race strategy, telemetry, and the engineering behind every tenth of a second — the same obsession with performance I bring to software.

interests.name: Biking
interests.description: Trail riding whenever I can get out — the best systems thinking happens somewhere in the woods.

interests.name: Football
interests.description: Always counting down to the next World Cup.

interests.name: Travelling
interests.description: From Zimbabwe to Louisiana and beyond — see the places that shaped the journey.
